summary.zh: 追蹤遊戲市場價格變化，讓交易判斷更快更清楚。
summary.en: Tracks game-market price shifts so trading decisions are easier to compare.

challenge.zh: 遊戲交易市場物價變動極快且無官方穩定 API，直連抓取易被阻擋。我設計了容錯解析機制與排程重試策略，在數據格式突發變更時自動降級，維持資料擷取的穩定性。
challenge.en: Game market prices shift rapidly without a stable official API, making scraping brittle. I designed a fault-tolerant parser with an automated retry scheduler to fallback gracefully during schema changes.

impact.zh: 提供即時的遊戲物品價格波動趨勢，幫助玩家做出更具時效性的交易決策。
impact.en: Delivers real-time price trend charts to help gamers make time-sensitive trading decisions.

summary.zh: 把台股權證條件整理成可篩選的工作台。
summary.en: Turns Taiwan warrant conditions into a practical screening workspace.

challenge.zh: 權證條款複雜且歷史數據量龐大，在前端進行多維度條件篩選時易造成卡頓。我優化了資料篩選演算法，利用二元搜尋與預解析機制，確保跨標的比較能在 100ms 內完成。
challenge.en: Filtering historical warrant data with complex terms causes browser lag. I optimized the client-side screening algorithm using binary search and pre-parsing, cutting cross-asset comparison times under 100ms.

impact.zh: 將複雜的台股權證條件整理成直覺的比較工作台，幫助投資人快速找出隱含波動率與槓桿最優的權證。
impact.en: Provides a screening workspace that helps investors instantly spot warrants with optimal implied volatility and leverage.

summary.zh: 我最常用的 Telegram 驅動工作中樞，整合所有 TG 指令、KOL 每日掃描和 NotebookLM 連動。
summary.en: My most-used Telegram-driven operations hub, connecting every TG command with daily KOL scanning and NotebookLM handoff.

zh: KOL 每日掃描與簡短報告
en: Daily KOL scan with short brief
Stock, ETF, rank, and watchlist replies

problem.zh: 每天要追 KOL、Podcast、個股、ETF、Threads 和文章時，資訊入口太分散；這個 bot 把輸入指令、NotebookLM 分析、報告連結和市場資料回覆集中到 Telegram。
problem.en: Daily KOL, podcast, stock, ETF, Threads, and article workflows were scattered across tools. This bot centralizes commands, NotebookLM analysis, report links, and market replies inside Telegram.

workflow.zh: TG 指令或排程觸發 GitHub Actions；內容工作流把網址、影片或 KOL 來源交給 NotebookLM；結果先回 Telegram 簡短結論，再附完整 HTML 報告連結。NotebookLM session 透過 NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 還原 auth.json、cookies.json 和 metadata.json。
workflow.en: Telegram commands or schedules dispatch GitHub Actions. Content workflows pass URLs, videos, or KOL sources to NotebookLM, then return a short Telegram brief plus a full HTML report link. NotebookLM sessions are restored from NLM_COOKIE_BASE64 into auth.json, cookies.json, and metadata.json.

zh: /nlm：輸入網址，回傳 NotebookLM 摘要分析
/note：產生詳細 HTML 報告連結
/stock：回傳個股健檢、技術面和產業摘要
/etf、/activeetf、/rank、/roi、/watchlist：處理 ETF、熱門排行、報酬和自選股
en: /nlm: send a URL and receive NotebookLM analysis
/note: generate a detailed HTML report link
/stock: return stock health, technicals, and industry context
/etf, /activeetf, /rank, /roi, /watchlist: handle ETF, ranking, return, and watchlist workflows

challenge.zh: NotebookLM 官方無公開 API，且 Google 認證 Cookie 通常於 2-4 週內過期。為此，我透過 Base64 還原機制在 GitHub Actions 中還原 auth/cookies 憑證，並開發了自動診斷工具（debug_yt_auth.py）實現憑證健康監控。
challenge.en: NotebookLM has no public API, and auth cookies expire in 2-4 weeks. I implemented a Base64-based session restoration pipeline in GitHub Actions and built diagnostic tools (debug_yt_auth.py) for proactive credential health monitoring.

impact.zh: 每日自動化整合 KOL 訂閱、Podcast 轉錄和金融大盤數據，幫個人節省 45 分鐘的資訊尋檢與整理時間。
impact.en: Saves 45 minutes of daily manual curation by automating daily KOL scanning, podcast transcripts, and financial market briefs.

summary.zh: 跨平台查價與比價工具，幫產品採購快速看出價格落差。
summary.en: A cross-market price intelligence tool for spotting purchase and listing gaps.

challenge.zh: 日本価格.com 的 HTML 解析需處理 Shift JIS 特殊編碼以防亂碼，且部分電商網站設有反爬蟲限制。我採用 curl_cffi 模擬 Chrome TLS 指紋避開反爬，並在 FastAPI 後端透過併發限制與快取保護付費 API 用量。
challenge.en: Scraping Japanese kakaku.com required parsing raw Shift JIS bytes, and retail sites blocked standard headless clients. I used curl_cffi to match Chrome's TLS fingerprint and protected API quotas using Redis cache rules.

impact.zh: 提供流暢的 SSE 串流跨境比價，並支援前端即時中止搜尋，大幅節省頻寬與 API 配額。
impact.en: Delivers real-time cross-border pricing via SSE (Server-Sent Events) with request abort support to minimize bandwidth and API costs.

summary.zh: 把八字命理和 Gemini 分析包成可互動的 PWA。
summary.en: Combines BaZi astrology and Gemini analysis in an interactive PWA.

challenge.zh: 傳統八字命理排盤規則繁雜且多分支，且 AI 分析結果容易流於空泛。我使用 TypeScript 精準實作了干支與地藏排盤算法，並設計結構化的 Gemini System Instruction 讓 AI 輸出專屬的解盤報告。
challenge.en: Traditional astrology charting involves complex branch rules, and LLM readings often sound generic. I implemented the complete BaZi calendar logic in TypeScript and used structured Gemini prompts to secure personalized readings.

impact.zh: 將傳統命理排盤與現代 AI 分析融為一體，提供流暢的離線 PWA 行動端體驗。
impact.en: Blends traditional astrology with AI analysis, wrapping it in an offline-capable PWA mobile layout.

summary.zh: 給券商 MTF 協議測試使用的跨平台 GUI 工具。
summary.en: A cross-platform GUI utility for broker MTF socket testing.

challenge.zh: 金融交易 MTF 協議使用自訂的二進位封包格式，且需要同時維持多個 Socket 連線與 Heartbeat。我利用 Flet (Python) 實作了非同步 Socket 通訊與封包二進位解碼器，解決了連線異常中斷時的佔線與 DDoS 保護問題。
challenge.en: Broker MTF protocols use custom binary formats, requiring persistent socket connections and heartbeats. I used Flet to build an async connection manager and a packet decoder to solve socket leaks and server lockout issues.

impact.zh: 提供跨平台的桌面 GUI 工具，讓測試人員在 1 分鐘內完成新券商環境的連線與 TC 報價連動測試。
impact.en: Enables testing teams to setup, connect, and verify new broker profiles and real-time market data in less than a minute.

summary.zh: 整合台股、海外連動與風險訊號，做成每日可看的決策儀表板。
summary.en: A daily market-health dashboard that combines Taiwan equities, global signals, and risk alerts.

challenge.zh: 需要盤後同時抓取台股官網、海外多個金融 API 並即時運算風險預警模型。為此，我設計了併發限制與資料清洗模組，確保在大數據量下仍能穩定執行崩盤指標運算。
challenge.en: Required merging multiple stock APIs, index data, and risk metrics concurrently post-market. I implemented request throttling and robust data parsing pipelines to ensure calculations run reliably on serverless runners.

impact.zh: 每日收盤自動更新風險訊號，並將關鍵的籌碼流向與崩盤指標提前推送至 Telegram 輔助投資決策。
impact.en: Provides early indicators of market turning points, automatically pushed daily to Telegram to assist investment decisions.

summary.zh: 分析 Shorts 爆紅比例，找出不露臉內容的潛力題材。
summary.en: Analyzes Shorts viral ratios to uncover faceless content opportunities.

summary.zh: 自動篩選 YouTube 影片，整理摘要後推播到日常工作流。
summary.en: Filters YouTube videos, summarizes useful content, and pushes it into a daily workflow.

challenge.zh: YouTube API 每天的免費 Quota 極度吃緊（10k 限制），且大流量下極易被判定為濫用。我設計了請求快取與排程併發控制，並結合 tools/setup_helper.py 解決了 2-4 週一次的憑證過期問題。
challenge.en: YouTube's free API Quota is highly constrained, and heavy automation triggers abuse blocks. I designed a caching layout and request throttling, paired with tools/setup_helper.py to manage auth expiration.

impact.zh: 每日自動精選高價值長影片並推送摘要，實現零手動尋片的主動資訊流。
impact.en: Enables an active knowledge pipeline by delivering daily YouTube briefs without manual video scouting.

summary.zh: 把北部排球資訊整理成容易查找的指南。
summary.en: Organizes northern Taiwan volleyball information into an easy browsing guide.

summary.zh: 高爾夫策略輔助工具的早期產品原型。
summary.en: An early product prototype for golf strategy assistance.

summary.zh: 為電子供應鏈公司打造的現代企業入口。
summary.en: A modern corporate site for an electronics supply-chain business.

summary.zh: 重機械租賃與土方工程服務的行動友善網站。
summary.en: A mobile-friendly PWA for heavy machinery rental and earthwork services.

summary.zh: 復健與物理治療診所的品牌網站。
summary.en: A brand site for a rehabilitation and physical therapy clinic.

summary.zh: 追蹤 MOPS 轉讓預告，提前整理籌碼異動訊號。
summary.en: Tracks MOPS transfer notices and surfaces insider-share movement signals.

summary.zh: 管理券商連線與憑證資訊的內部儀表板。
summary.en: An internal dashboard for broker connection and credential operations.

summary.zh: 把 Podcast 轉成結構化報告和心智圖，讓聽過的內容更好整理。
summary.en: Turns podcasts into structured reports and mind maps for easier review.

challenge.zh: 常規語音轉文字在長音檔中極易斷線且耗時，且 AI 輸出的 Mermaid 心智圖語法常因格式錯亂導致前端渲染失敗。我使用 Gemini 超長上下文窗口一次性輸入完整音檔，並設計特殊的 Prompt 規範確保 Mermaid 語法 100% 正確率。
challenge.en: Long audio files cause timeouts in standard transcription APIs, and AI-generated Mermaid code often suffers from syntax errors that break UI rendering. I leveraged Gemini's large context window and designed robust prompt validation to guarantee 100% syntax compliance.

impact.zh: 「聽完一小時節目只需 30 秒」，能在數分鐘內生成帶有時間戳點擊播放的結構化報告與互動心智圖。
impact.en: Turns a 60-minute episode into a 30-second read, rendering interactive mind maps and clickable audio timestamps in minutes.

summary.zh: 整理預售屋資料，用資料角度觀察市場熱區。
summary.en: Organizes presale housing data to spot market activity patterns.

summary.zh: 把 Windows .msg 郵件轉成 Mac 友善的 HTML。
summary.en: Converts Windows .msg email files into Mac-friendly HTML.

challenge.zh: Windows Outlook 產生的 .msg 檔案是複合文件二進位格式 (CFBF)，結構複雜且常含有 nested 物件。我利用本機二進位流解析技術，在不依賴 Outlook 元件的前提下精準提取 HTML 內文與多格式附件。
challenge.en: Outlook .msg files are binary Compound File Binary Format (CFBF), housing nested attachments. I wrote a parser using low-level binary streams to extract HTML bodies and attachments without Outlook runtime dependencies.

impact.zh: 解決了 Mac 系統無法讀取 MSG 郵件的相容性問題，幾秒內即可在瀏覽器中預覽排版完整的信件。
impact.en: Resolves macOS compatibility issues with MSG files, rendering pixel-perfect email previews and attachments in seconds.

summary.zh: 用資料揭露路段估值落差與房地產風險。
summary.en: Uses local data to reveal valuation gaps and real-estate risk signals.

challenge.zh: 政府公開的實價登錄與周邊設施資料格式多樣且座標系統不一。我設計了資料庫清洗模組，將 WGS84 與 TWD97 座標進行統一轉換，並利用空間索引快速計算各路段的估值落差與鄰里環境風險。
challenge.en: Public real estate records use varying formats and geodetic coordinate datums. I built a data pipeline that unifies WGS84 and TWD97 datums and used spatial indexes to analyze price discrepancies and local hazards.

impact.zh: 以數據揭露同路段的估值落差，幫助購屋族避開嫌惡設施與溢價風險。
impact.en: Uses local spatial data to highlight price anomalies and environmental hazards, protecting buyers from paying premiums.

summary.zh: 用 AI 分析財經新聞情緒並整理成投資觀察。
summary.en: Uses AI to analyze financial-news sentiment and produce market observations.

summary.zh: 快速試算二代健保補充保費和眷屬負擔。
summary.en: Calculates Taiwan NHI supplemental premiums and dependent costs.

challenge.zh: 台灣二代健保補充保費與眷屬負擔計算規則包含多個起扣點與累進費率，規則易變更。我將計算邏輯與費率參數完全解耦，設計了可配置的費率表，確保政策變更時只需微調設定檔。
challenge.en: Taiwan's NHI calculation rules involve multiple thresholds and progressive brackets. I decoupled the math logic from rate tables, creating a configurable layout to accommodate regulatory shifts easily.

impact.zh: 幫助小規模企業主或自由職業者快速算出補充保費及眷屬扣額，減少人工查表試算時間。
impact.en: Helps small business owners and freelancers compute supplemental premiums and net pays in seconds, avoiding manual lookup tables.

summary.zh: 把兩個目錄的設定差異視覺化，減少人工比對時間。
summary.en: Visualizes configuration differences across directories to reduce manual comparison.

summary.zh: 把聚餐、下午茶、投票和費用整理成團隊儀表板。
summary.en: Organizes team meals, drink orders, voting, and expense records.

challenge.zh: 多人訂單統計與分帳涉及複雜的狀態切換（投票中、已收單、付款中）與精確的金流四捨五入計算。我設計了簡單的狀態機來管控揪團生命週期，確保訂單與付款狀態的最終一致性。
challenge.en: Group orders and bill splitting involve multi-user states and currency rounding logic. I implemented a simple state machine to manage order stages, ensuring data consistency for group costs and tallies.

impact.zh: 將團隊下午茶統計與付款流程自動化，大幅減少發起人核對費用與收款的時間。
impact.en: Automates team meal orders and payments, reducing checkout and bookkeeping overhead for organizers.

summary.zh: 用 FastAPI 和 Scikit-learn 做即時手寫數字辨識。
summary.en: A FastAPI and Scikit-learn app for real-time handwritten digit recognition.

challenge.zh: 前端 HTML5 Canvas 繪製的影像大小、粗細與對比度不一，直接送入模型辨識率低。我採用 Canvas 即時影像處理，將手寫圖案進行居中、灰階化與 28x28 尺寸歸一化 (Normalization)，使其完美適配卷積模型輸入。
challenge.en: Handwritten inputs on Canvas vary in size, stroke thickness, and alignment. I processed the canvas data in real-time, applying centering, grayscale conversion, and 28x28 normalization to match the training data layout.

impact.zh: 在瀏覽器中實現低延遲的手寫即時辨識驗證，展示前端前處理與機器學習模型的無縫結合。
impact.en: Enables low-latency handwritten digit recognition directly in-browser, illustrating the connection of canvas data and ML inference.

summary.zh: 探索 FastAPI、PydanticAI、MCP 和串流聊天流程。
summary.en: Explores FastAPI, PydanticAI, MCP, and streaming chat workflows.

summary.zh: 把訓練資料整理成可瀏覽的展示工具。
summary.en: Turns training material into a browsable viewer.

summary.zh: 用三代理人辯論流程輔助聰明錢交易分析。
summary.en: Uses a three-agent debate flow to support smart-money-concept trading analysis.

challenge.zh: 金融聰明錢概念 (SMC) 分析規則涉及高度的主觀經驗判斷，單一 AI 容易產生偏差。我設計了三代理人辯論協定，讓分析代理人、反方審查代理人與最終裁判代理人進行多輪辯論，以降低 AI 的幻覺與偏見。
challenge.en: Smart Money Concepts (SMC) analysis is highly subjective, and single LLM inputs often yield biased trade setups. I built a three-agent debate protocol where an analyst, a critic, and a judge debate to minimize hallucinations.

impact.zh: 自動繪製並審查 SMC 技術結構，提供更客觀、更具邏輯的交易輔助決策。
impact.en: Automates the identification and review of SMC market structures, delivering unbiased insights for trading workflows.
